ground_truth.title: Muni Alerts | SFMTA
ground_truth.main_content: Muni Alerts - Real-time updates and service alerts for San Francisco's Muni transit system. The page provides information to help riders stay informed about delays, detours, and other service changes. Trip Planner tool is available for planning transit, biking, walking, or driving trips within San Francisco. A subscription service is available for receiving alerts updates directly.
with: The Muni Alert webpage provides real-time updates and service alerts for San Francisco's Muni transit system, helping riders stay informed about delays, detours, and other service changes.
We are unable to display alerts at this time. Alerts are still available by subscription.
Trip Planner: Enter starting location and ending location to plan your Muni trip.
Alerts are available by subscription for real-time updates on service changes.
Loading... content placeholder for dynamically loaded alert information.
